sites.title: Work sites
sites.subtitle: Manage work sites, assigned workers and the custom fields of activity logs
sites.deleteConfirm: The site "{{name}}" will be deleted and no longer visible to workers. Activities already logged remain in the reports.

form.name: Name
form.statusHint: Workers can only log activities on open sites.
form.assigneesHint: Only assigned workers see the site in the app and can log activities.

fields.title: Custom fields

hint.entry: Extra fields requested when a worker logs a site activity.
hint.mezzo: Extra descriptive fields of the vehicles (e.g. plate, inspection due date).

fields.deleteConfirm: The field "{{label}}" will no longer be requested. Values already logged remain in the reports.

form.label: Label
form.fieldTypeImmutable: The type cannot be changed after creation.
form.positionHint: Display order in the form (lowest first).

mezzi.title: Vehicles
mezzi.subtitle: Manage the vehicles usable in site activities
mezzi.deleteConfirm: The vehicle "{{name}}" will be deleted and no longer selectable in activities.

form.name: Name
form.assigneesHint: Only assigned workers can select the vehicle in their activities.

dashboard.title: Work sites dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Monthly summary of activities per site

detail.title: Activities at {{name}}
detail.empty: No activity logged in the selected month.

emailDialog.title: Send report by email
emailDialog.hint: The PDF report of "{{name}}" — {{month}} will be sent to the addresses below (max {{max}}).
emailDialog.errorEmailRequired: Enter at least one email address
emailDialog.errorEmailInvalid: Check the email addresses you entered
